{{Expand}}

{{Infobox location
| name = Seishen royal garden
| introduced = Underlord
}}

== Underlord ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|The [[Seishen royal garden]] is kept by [[Riyusai Meira]].<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c10">''Underlord'', chapter 10</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Locations]]
[[Category:Underlord]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle locations]]
[[Category:Structures]]
